# Success Marketing

> Success Marketing is one of India's largest wholesalers and exporters of disposable and eco-friendly food packaging, established in 1991 in Kota, Rajasthan. We supply restaurants, cloud kitchens, QSR chains, hotels, caterers, sweet shops, bakeries, and food brands across all of India, and we export to the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, European Union, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Oman, Bahrain, Kuwait, Africa, Australia, and New Zealand.

## About

- **Legal name:** Success Marketing
- **Founded:** 1991 by Rajesh Agarwal
- **Head office:** 8-C, New Grain Mandi, Aerodrome Circle, Kota, Rajasthan 324007, India
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 90240 48484
- **Email:** successmarketingkota@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://successmarketingkota.com
- **Service area:** Pan-India (all 28 states and 8 union territories) + exports to USA, Canada, UK, EU, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Oman, Kuwait, Bahrain, Africa, Australia, New Zealand
- **Business model:** B2B wholesale, bulk supply, private-label and custom-printed packaging, export-ready FSSAI/FDA/EU-compliant packaging.

## What we supply

- Disposable cups and glasses (paper, PP, PET) from 20 ml to 500 ml
- Disposable food containers (PP microwave-safe, PET clear, bagasse, kraft) from 100 ml to 2000 ml
- Aluminium foil containers in every standard size (450 ml, 660 ml, 750 ml, 1000 ml, 1500 ml, 2000 ml, multi-compartment)
- Burger boxes, pizza boxes, cake boxes, biryani boxes, sweet boxes, meal trays
- Plates (paper, bagasse, areca palm leaf, plastic) in 6", 7", 8", 10", 12", compartment and thali formats
- Bowls (paper, bagasse, PP) from 120 ml to 750 ml
- Cutlery - spoons, forks, knives, stirrers (plastic, CPLA, wooden)
- Paper straws, paper bags, tissue, napkins, chef caps, gloves
- Kulhads and traditional terracotta clay cups
- Eco-friendly / biodegradable / compostable packaging (bagasse, PLA, areca, kraft, wheat straw)
- Custom-printed packaging with your brand logo for export and domestic use

## Key product pages

- [All Products](https://successmarketingkota.com/Products.html): Master catalogue of every SKU we stock and export.
- [Disposable Cups & Glasses](https://successmarketingkota.com/Cups.html): Paper, PP and PET cups in 20-500 ml.
- [Paper Cups](https://successmarketingkota.com/Paper_Cups.html): Hot and cold paper cups, coffee/tea/juice, printable.
- [Food Containers](https://successmarketingkota.com/Containers.html): PP, PET, bagasse containers, microwave & freezer safe.
- [Small Containers](https://successmarketingkota.com/Small_Containers.html): 100-500 ml chutney, sauce, dip, dessert containers.
- [Small Bowls](https://successmarketingkota.com/Small_Bowls.html): 120-350 ml dessert and curry bowls.
- [Plates](https://successmarketingkota.com/Plates.html): Paper, bagasse, areca palm leaf plates, 6"-12", compartment and thali.
- [Aluminium Foil Containers](https://successmarketingkota.com/Alu.html): Full range from 250 ml to 2000 ml.
- [Boxes](https://successmarketingkota.com/Boxes.html): Pizza, burger, cake, biryani, sweet, meal and combo boxes.
- [Lids](https://successmarketingkota.com/Lids.html): Matching lids for every container and foil size.
- [Spoons & Cutlery](https://successmarketingkota.com/Spoons.html): Plastic, CPLA and wooden cutlery sets.
- [Kulhads](https://successmarketingkota.com/Kulhads.html): Traditional Indian terracotta clay cups.
- [Tissue & Napkins](https://successmarketingkota.com/Tissue.html): Restaurant and takeaway tissues.
- [Chef Caps](https://successmarketingkota.com/Chef.html): Kitchen caps and disposable headwear.
- [Thermocol / FW](https://successmarketingkota.com/FW.html): Foam packaging and insulation products.
- [CP / Cling & Plastic Wraps](https://successmarketingkota.com/CP.html): Cling film, food wrap.

## Hyperlocal guides (Kota, Rajasthan - our hometown, same-day delivery)

Our warehouse sits at 8-C, New Grain Mandi, Aerodrome Circle, Kota, Rajasthan 324007. We provide same-day delivery to Gumanpura, Talwandi, Chhavni, Dadabari, Vigyan Nagar, Mahavir Nagar, Rajeev Gandhi Nagar, Kunhari, Aerodrome Circle, Keshavpura, Rangbari, Indraprastha Industrial Area and every other Kota neighbourhood. We also run weekly dispatch routes to Bundi, Jhalawar, Baran, Sawai Madhopur, Chittorgarh and Bhilwara.

## Popular blog topics

- Pizza boxes near me, pizza box sizes, pizza packaging for delivery
- Burger boxes near me, clamshell burger boxes, QSR burger packaging
- Biryani packaging for delivery, biryani buckets, biryani boxes near me
- Momos, shawarma, rolls, kathi roll, dosa, chaat and street-food packaging
- Cake, pastry, cookie, dessert and bakery packaging
- Paper cups, kulhads, lassi glasses, juice cups, milkshake cups
- Eco-friendly, biodegradable, bagasse, areca and compostable packaging
- FSSAI, BIS, EPR, FDA and EU export compliance for food packaging
- Custom-printed branded packaging for restaurants, hotels and cloud kitchens
- State-wise and city-wise packaging supplier guides across India
- Export guides for food packaging to USA, Europe, UAE and Middle East

## Why buyers choose Success Marketing

- 34+ years of trading experience since 1991
- Direct wholesale pricing with no middlemen
- Pan-India dispatch within 24-48 hours from Kota, Rajasthan
- Export-ready packaging meeting FSSAI (India), FDA (USA), EU 10/2011, UAE ESMA and GCC standards
- Custom branding and private-label on MOQs starting from 5,000 units
- End-to-end catalogue: one vendor for every disposable your kitchen needs
- Deep bench of eco-friendly and compostable alternatives for brands targeting sustainability
